findings.description: The knowledge file defines an explicit format for exports as '**変数定義（exports）の書式**: `%{(変数スコープ書式)} (値式)`' — a synthesized format definition that does not appear in the source. The source explicitly defines the conditions format ('条件の指定は以下の書式で行う。`%{(変数種別名):(変数名)} (パターン)`') but provides no equivalent explicit format definition for exports — only code examples. The knowledge file has added a structurally parallel format definition that was not stated in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source provides explicit format only for conditions: '条件の指定は以下の書式で行う。 %{(変数種別名):(変数名)} (パターン)'. For exports, the source only shows an XML code example with the comment '<!-- リクエストスコープ上の変数 prevUrl に、リファラヘッダの値を設定する。-->'.
